contact.address: P.O. Limda, Tal. Waghodia, Vadodara, Gujarat 391760
contact.office_hours: Monday to Saturday, 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM IST

undergraduate.eligibility: Pass in Class 10+2 (Higher Secondary) with a minimum of 45% aggregate marks (40% for reserved categories). Specific entrance exams required: B.Tech (JEE Main/GUJCET), B.Arch (NATA/JEE), B.Des (PU-DAT).
requirements: Class 10 and 12 mark sheets and certificates
undergraduate.process: 1. Register on the Parul University admissions portal. 2. Fill in personal, contact, and academic details. 3. Upload scanned copies of required mark sheets and IDs. 4. Pay the application fee (INR 2,000) online. 5. Document verification by admissions office. 6. Receive provisional admission letter and pay tuition fees.

postgraduate.eligibility: Bachelor's degree in a relevant discipline from a recognized university with at least 50% aggregate marks (45% for reserved categories).
requirements: Class 10, 12, and Graduation degree certificates/mark sheets
postgraduate.process: 1. Submit application online at the official portal. 2. Provide undergraduate academic credentials and entrance exam scores. 3. Participate in counseling/personal interview rounds (for MBA and specialized PG programs). 4. Upon selection, pay course fees to secure admission.

scholarships.merit_based: Up to 50% tuition waiver for outstanding academic achievements in board examinations or national level entrance tests.
scholarships.need_based: Financial assistance, sports quota exemptions, and sibling/defense personal fee waivers available upon application verification.

courses.course_name: MBBS (Bachelor of Medicine & Bachelor of Surgery)

fees.payment_methods: Tuition fees can be paid via credit/debit card, net banking, UPI, or Demand Draft through the student ERP portal.
fees.installment_plan: Fees are payable on a semester-wise basis (twice a year). Extended monthly or quarterly installment plans can be requested at the accounts office.
fees.refund_policy: In line with UGC guidelines. A full refund (less INR 1,000 processing fee) is issued if requested before classes begin. Partial deductions apply dynamically after commencement.

policies.attendance_requirement: Students must maintain a minimum of 75% attendance in theory lectures and practical labs to be eligible for final examinations.
policies.grading_system: 10-point scale: O (Outstanding), A+ (Excellent), A (Very Good), B+ (Good), B (Above Average), C (Average), P (Pass), F (Fail). Passing criteria is 40% aggregate.
policies.makeup_exams: Remedial/Supplementary examinations are conducted after results declaration. Candidates with medical emergencies can apply for special exemption with a dean's request.

Semester 1: CS101: Introduction to Programming in C/Python
Semester 2: CS201: Object Oriented Programming using Java

Semester 1: CS101: Introduction to Programming in C/Python

Semester 2: BCA201: Data Structures and Core Libraries
Semester 3: BCA301: Object Oriented Systems using Java

Semester 2: MCA201: Python for Data Science & AI

CS101: Introduction to Programming in C/Python
Semester 2: DS203: SQL and NoSQL Database Systems

Semester 1: BBA101: Principles and Practices of Management
Semester 2: BBA202: Business Mathematics and Quantitative Tools

Semester 1: MBA104: Quantitative Methods for Decision Making
BP101T: Human Anatomy and Physiology - I
Semester 2: BP201T: Human Anatomy and Physiology - II

LLB102: Law of Torts & Consumer Protection
LLB103: General Principles of Contract - I
Semester 2: LLB201: Constitutional Law of India - II
LLB202: Law of Special Contracts - II
LLB203: Criminal Law - I (Indian Penal Code)
Semester 3: LLB303: Transfer of Property and Easement Laws

Semester 1: AR101: Basic Architectural Design Studio - I
AR102: Visual Arts, Sketching and Graphics
AR103: Building Materials and Construction - I
AR104: Theory and Aesthetics of Design
Semester 2: AR204: History of Western & Indian Architecture - I
Semester 3: AR303: Climatology and Passive Solar Design

DES102: Freehand Sketching and Representation Techniques
DES103: Elements of Color and Composition Theory
DES104: History of Global Art & Design Aesthetics
Semester 2: DES201: Typography, Grid Layouts and Branding
DES202: Visual Identity, Logos and Vector Graphics
DES204: Spatial Geometry and Interior Volumes
Semester 3: DES303: Interaction and UX Design Prototyping

Phase I (1st Professional Year): COM1: Community Medicine & Public Health - I
Phase III (3rd Professional Year): COM2: Community Health and Preventive Medicine - II

BAM203: Roga Nidan evam Vikriti Vigyan (Pathology)

Semester 2: NUR203: Intro to Medical Computers & Infotech
NUR204: Preventive Medicine and Personal Hygiene
Semester 3: NUR301: Medical Surgical Nursing - I (Adult care)

Semester 2: AGR201: Principles of Genetics & Plant Breeding

BCOM304: Modern Banking and Financial Services

announcements.desc: Parul University welcomes MS Dhoni for the grand youth leadership campaign.

events.desc: Annual cultural extravaganza hosting celebrities and national level student competitions.

events.desc: Exhibition of top technical projects and innovations by engineering students.

faqs.question: How can I check my semester results?
faqs.answer: You can check your semester results on the PU Student Portal under the 'Exams and Results' section.

faqs.question: What is the attendance requirement?
faqs.answer: Students must maintain a minimum of 75% attendance in each course to be eligible to sit for the term-end examinations.

undergraduate.eligibility: Pass in Class 10+2 (Higher Secondary) with a minimum of 60% aggregate marks. Entrance scorecard required (JEE Main/SAT/University Test).
undergraduate.process: 1. Apply online at portal. 2. Enter academic scores. 3. Allocation list based on merit/scores. 4. Fee submission to confirm seats.

postgraduate.eligibility: Graduation degree with at least 55% aggregate marks from a recognized board. Entrance tests applicable (GATE/CAT).
postgraduate.process: 1. Register on portal. 2. Upload transcripts and entrance cards. 3. Personal interview or counseling. 4. Seat locking.

scholarships.merit_based: Up to 100% tuition waiver for national top-rankers and high university entrance exam achievers.
scholarships.need_based: Financial aids and interest subsidies on student loans.

fees.payment_methods: Net Banking, Credit/Debit Card, UPI, and Bank Demand Draft.
fees.installment_plan: Fees can be split into two semesters per year.
fees.refund_policy: Full refund within 15 days of admission, with 10% administrative deduction thereafter.

hostel.details: AC/Non-AC premium hosteling options with 24/7 security, high-speed Wi-Fi, and modular laundry hubs.

announcements.desc: The academic session 2026-27 begins from August 1st. Attendance is mandatory from Day 1.

events.desc: National hackathon venue hosting over 50 campus code teams.

news.desc: Funded facility dedicated to student startup incubations and legal IP filings.

faqs.answer: All scholarship forms must be submitted along with relevant board records before June 15th.

faqs.question: Are there dynamic student club programs?
faqs.answer: Yes, we support technical clubs, cultural chapters, and social welfare societies active all year.

undergraduate.eligibility: Pass in Class 10+2 (Higher Secondary) with a minimum of 60% aggregate marks. Entrance scorecard required (JEE Main/SAT/University Test).
undergraduate.process: 1. Apply online at portal. 2. Enter academic scores. 3. Allocation list based on merit/scores. 4. Fee submission to confirm seats.

postgraduate.eligibility: Graduation degree with at least 55% aggregate marks from a recognized board. Entrance tests applicable (GATE/CAT).
postgraduate.process: 1. Register on portal. 2. Upload transcripts and entrance cards. 3. Personal interview or counseling. 4. Seat locking.

scholarships.merit_based: Up to 100% tuition waiver for national top-rankers and high university entrance exam achievers.
scholarships.need_based: Financial aids and interest subsidies on student loans.

fees.payment_methods: Net Banking, Credit/Debit Card, UPI, and Bank Demand Draft.
fees.installment_plan: Fees can be split into two semesters per year.
fees.refund_policy: Full refund within 15 days of admission, with 10% administrative deduction thereafter.

hostel.details: AC/Non-AC premium hosteling options with 24/7 security, high-speed Wi-Fi, and modular laundry hubs.

kbcnmu.university_name: Kavayitri Bahinabai Chaudhari North Maharashtra University, Jalgaon

contact.office_hours: Monday to Saturday, 10:00 AM - 5:30 PM IST

undergraduate.eligibility: Pass in Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics (minimum 45% aggregate; 40% for reserved categories). Maharashtra State Candidate (MHT-CET) or All India Candidate (JEE Main) score required.
undergraduate.process: 1. Complete CAP registration on the DTE Maharashtra website. 2. Verify documents at designated Facilitation Centers (FC). 3. Fill option forms indicating choice of North Maharashtra University, Jalgaon. 4. Accept seat allotment during CAP rounds and report to campus.

payment_methods: Demand Draft payable to Registrar, NMU Jalgaon
fees.installment_plan: Fees can be split into two half-yearly term installments.
fees.refund_policy: Full refund minus processing charge of INR 1,000 if cancelled prior to the commencement of the academic term.

exams.schedule: Mid-Semester Examinations are conducted in October and March. End-Semester University Examinations are conducted in December and May.
exams.policies: Minimum 75% attendance is mandatory to appear for examinations. Passing criteria is 40% aggregate in internal and external assessment.

hostel.details: Separate boys and girls hostel wings with Wi-Fi, reading halls, recreation common rooms, and hygienic mess facilities.

campus_facilities: On-campus Bank (State Bank of India) and ATM

announcements.title: KBCNMU CAP Admissions 2026
announcements.desc: CAP Round choices filling portal is open now. Refer to DTE schedule.

announcements.title: Youth Festival Selection
announcements.desc: Inter-collegiate youth cultural festival selections commence next week.

events.title: Avishkar Research Convention
events.desc: State-level student research model presentations event.

events.title: Umgiri Cultural Fest
events.desc: Annual gathering showcasing dramatic, dance, and literary contests.

news.title: Vice-Chancellor inaugurates new lab
news.desc: Advanced materials testing center inaugurated in School of Chemical Sciences.

news.title: DST-FIST Grant Awarded
news.desc: Department of Physics receives national funding for upgrade of research lab equipment.

faqs.question: How do I apply for duplicate transcripts?
faqs.answer: You can apply online via the KBCNMU Student Portal or visit the Examination Section on working days.

faqs.question: Is transport facility available?
faqs.answer: Yes, city bus services regularly run from Jalgaon Bus Stand to the NMU campus gate.

dbatu.university_name: Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar Technological University, Lonere

contact.office_hours: Monday to Saturday, 10:00 AM - 5:30 PM IST

undergraduate.eligibility: Candidate should have passed Class 12 (HSC) with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects along with Chemistry/Biotechnology/Biology/Technical Vocational subject, securing at least 45% marks (40% for backward class categories). Mandatory score in MHT-CET or JEE Main.
requirements: HSC (Class 12) & SSC (Class 10) mark sheets & passing certificates
undergraduate.process: 1. Online CAP admission form submission on State CET Cell Maharashtra portal. 2. E-scrutiny or physical verification of uploaded documents. 3. Online submission & confirmation of option forms. 4. Seat acceptance and reporting to the university campus at Lonere.

payment_methods: Demand Draft payable to Registrar, DBATU Lonere
fees.installment_plan: Payment of fees in two equal installments at the beginning of each semester is allowed upon written request.
fees.refund_policy: Refund policy is compliant with DTE Maharashtra CAP guidelines. Processing fee of INR 1,000 is non-refundable.

exams.schedule: Continuous Assessment tests are scheduled monthly. End-Semester examinations occur in November/December for odd semesters, and April/May for even semesters.
exams.policies: Students must secure 75% attendance in theory and laboratory classes to qualify for end-sem exams. Grading is based on a 10-point CGPA scale.

hostel.details: Separate campus hostel wings for boys (Sahyadri, Himagiri) and girls (Gangotri) with basic amenities, study tables, common mess, and Wi-Fi connectivity.

campus_facilities: Main University Library with online e-resource portal

announcements.title: DBATU CAP Admission Schedule 2026
announcements.desc: CAP Seat allotment Round 1 reporting is live until August 12.

announcements.title: Grace Marks Rules Notification
announcements.desc: Academic Council publishes new guidelines for ordance grace marks.

events.title: Cynosure National Tech Fest
events.desc: National-level coding, robotics, paper presentation, and gaming competition.

events.title: Shivarpan Cultural Gathering
events.desc: Annual university cultural fest celebrating art, music, and local traditions.

news.title: DBATU Signs MoU with BARC
news.desc: Joint research initiatives signed for nuclear engineering research inputs.

news.title: E-Learning Portal Launch
news.desc: VC launches new digital LMS dashboard for affiliated colleges across Maharashtra.

faqs.question: How do I check if my college is affiliated to DBATU?
faqs.answer: The complete list of affiliated engineering and pharmacy colleges is published on the DBATU portal under Affiliation section.

faqs.question: What is the procedure for verification of marks?
faqs.answer: Apply online through the Student Exam Dashboard within 10 days of declaration of results.

gcet.university_name: Galgotias College of Engineering and Technology, Greater Noida

contact.address: 1, Knowledge Park II, Greater Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201310
contact.office_hours: Monday to Saturday, 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM IST

undergraduate.eligibility: Passed Class 12 (HSC) with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects along with Chemistry/Biotechnology/Biology/Technical Vocational subject, securing at least 45% marks (40% for reserved category). Score in JEE Main and UPSEE / UPCET (UPTAC counselling).
requirements: Class 10 and 12 mark sheets & passing certificates
Category Certificate & Income Certificate (if claiming fee waiver)
undergraduate.process: 1. Register on the UPTAC counselling portal using JEE Main credentials. 2. Upload academic documents for online verification. 3. Lock choices specifying Galgotias College of Engineering and Technology, Greater Noida (Code: 097). 4. Report to GCET campus for physical admission and fee payment after seat allotment.

payment_methods: Demand Draft payable to Galgotias College of Engineering & Technology
NetBanking / Debit Card on college portal
fees.installment_plan: Fees are payable in single annual amount at the time of admission. Term installment extension requires approval from Director.
fees.refund_policy: Refund policy is compliant with AICTE guidelines and AKTU affiliation instructions. Application fees are non-refundable.

exams.schedule: Sessional exams are conducted thrice per semester by the college. End-Semester examinations are conducted in December and May by Dr. A.P.J. Abdul Kalam Technical University (AKTU), Lucknow.
exams.policies: Students must have minimum 75% attendance in both theory and practical classes. Grading is based on the university credit system.

hostel.details: High quality separate hostels for boys and girls with fully furnished AC and Non-AC rooms, Wi-Fi connectivity, mess dining serving multi-cuisine meals, and indoor games lounge.

campus_facilities: Fully air-conditioned Central Library with digital portal
Advanced Computer Labs with high-speed fiber internet

announcements.title: UPTAC Counselling 2026 Choice Locking
announcements.desc: Choice locking round 1 for B.Tech courses starts on UPTAC website next week. Code: 097.

announcements.title: Accreditation Announcement
announcements.desc: GCET gains NBA accreditation for core engineering disciplines.

events.title: Galgotias Unifest
events.desc: Largest college annual cultural fest in Greater Noida featuring star nights and fashion shows.

events.title: G-Cognizance Technical Fest
events.desc: National-level hackathons, paper presentations, and business model competitions.

news.title: GCET ranks top in AKTU placements
news.desc: Galgotias engineering students secure 1200+ job offers in early phase placement rounds.

news.title: New Innovation Center
news.desc: Director inaugurates AI & Deep Learning Research Center in partnership with AWS.

faqs.question: What is the college code for UPTAC counselling?
faqs.answer: The college code for Galgotias College of Engineering & Technology in Greater Noida is 097.

faqs.question: Does GCET provide hostel facility for outstation students?
faqs.answer: Yes, high quality in-campus hostel accommodation is available on a first-come, first-served basis.
